rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn Of Deft Allstate Ins Co To Stay And/Or Compel Appraisal, Calendar Motion: Stay Proceedings, Calendar Motion: Compel
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR APPRAISAL GRANTED. COURT ORDERS APPRAISAL TO BE FULLY CONCLUDED BY NO LATER THAN JANUARY 31, 2002 BECAUSE OF SUBSTANTIAL DELAY WHICH HAS OCCURRED. IF APPRAISAL CAN'T BE FULLY CONCLUDED BY JANUARY 31, 2002 PARTIES SHOULD APPEAR AT EX PARTE CALENDAR AND SHOW CAUSE WHY APPRAISAL HAS NOT OCCURRED. (PB)
